languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

languages.text: "Магос, неужели ты не чуешь хворь в священных токах Движущей Силы? Не слышишь стоны благословенных машин? Оставь хвалебные псалмы и присоединяйся к инициации очистительных молебнов, досточтимый коллега".

"Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."
languages.original_text: "Магос, неужели ты не чуешь хворь в священных токах Движущей Силы? Не слышишь стоны благословенных машин? Оставь хвалебные псалмы и присоединяйся к инициации очистительных молебнов, досточтимый коллега".

traits.locale_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

"Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

"Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

languages.text: «Magos, ¿no huele la enfermedad en las sagradas corrientes de la Fuerza Motriz? ¿No oye los quejidos de las sagradas máquinas? Deje los salmos de exaltación y añada su voz a la iniciación de las oraciones purificadoras, estimado colega».
languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

traits.locale_text: «Magos, ¿no huele la enfermedad en las sagradas corrientes de la Fuerza Motriz? ¿No oye los quejidos de las sagradas máquinas? Deje los salmos de exaltación y añada su voz a la iniciación de las oraciones purificadoras, estimado colega».

languages.text: 「マゴス、モーティヴ・フォースの神聖な流れに巣くう不調を、あなたは嗅ぎ取れないのですか？ 祝福された機械たちのうめき声が、あなたには聞こえないのですか？ 賛美の聖歌はやめて、その声を浄化の祈りの開始に貸してください、尊敬する同僚」
languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

traits.locale_text: 「マゴス、モーティヴ・フォースの神聖な流れに巣くう不調を、あなたは嗅ぎ取れないのですか？ 祝福された機械たちのうめき声が、あなたには聞こえないのですか？ 賛美の聖歌はやめて、その声を浄化の祈りの開始に貸してください、尊敬する同僚」

languages.text: “贤者，难道你没有察觉到源力圣流中的病变吗？难道你没有听见受福机器的呻吟吗？尊敬的同僚，停下赞美诗，用你的声音发起净化祷词吧。”
languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

traits.locale_text: “贤者，难道你没有察觉到源力圣流中的病变吗？难道你没有听见受福机器的呻吟吗？尊敬的同僚，停下赞美诗，用你的声音发起净化祷词吧。”

languages.text: "Magos, riecht ihr die Malaise in den heiligen Strömungen der Antriebskraft nicht? Hört Ihr nicht das Stöhnen der heiligen Maschinen? Vergesst die preisenden Psalme und erhebt Eure Stimme zu reinigenden Gebeten, geschätzter Kollege."
languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Magos, riecht ihr die Malaise in den heiligen Strömungen der Antriebskraft nicht? Hört Ihr nicht das Stöhnen der heiligen Maschinen? Vergesst die preisenden Psalme und erhebt Eure Stimme zu reinigenden Gebeten, geschätzter Kollege."

languages.text: « Magos, ne sentez-vous pas le malaise imprégnant les courants sacrés de la Force Motrice ? N'entendez-vous pas les plaintes des machines bénies ? Laissez donc vos louanges et prêtez votre voix aux prières de purification, honorable collègue. »
languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

traits.locale_text: « Magos, ne sentez-vous pas le malaise imprégnant les courants sacrés de la Force Motrice ? N'entendez-vous pas les plaintes des machines bénies ? Laissez donc vos louanges et prêtez votre voix aux prières de purification, honorable collègue. »

languages.text: "Magos, Devinim Gücü'nün kutsal akımlarındaki rahatsızlığı sezmiyor musun? Kutsanmış makinelerin iniltilerini duymuyor musun? Övgü mezmurlarını bir kenara bırak ve arındırıcı duaların başlatılmasına ses ver saygıdeğer meslektaşım."
languages.original_text: "Magos, do you not smell the malaise in the sacred currents of the Motive Force? Do you not hear the moans of the blessed machines? Leave the psalms of praise and lend your voice to the initiation of purifying prayers, esteemed colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Magos, Devinim Gücü'nün kutsal akımlarındaki rahatsızlığı sezmiyor musun? Kutsanmış makinelerin iniltilerini duymuyor musun? Övgü mezmurlarını bir kenara bırak ve arındırıcı duaların başlatılmasına ses ver saygıdeğer meslektaşım."
